stemHtml: During a flight you enter a zone of lee waves which causes moderate turbulence. You decide to continue the flight and try to avoid the standing waves by:

options.a: Flying at right angles to the range of the mountain and decreasing the airspeed.
options.b: Flying at right angles to the range of the mountain and increasing the airspeed.
options.c: Fly parallel to the mountain range and decreasing the airspeed.
options.d: Fly parallel to the mountain range and increasing the airspeed.
